visual_description: A person with dark hair and a beard, wearing a dark shirt, is seen in close-up with their mouth open and eyes wide, looking toward the right side of the frame. A young girl with dark hair, wearing a blue jacket and a white turtleneck, stands in a doorway holding a phone to her ear with one hand while gesturing with the other. The scene is indoors with a lit lamp visible in the background, and the girl is partially framed by a white doorframe.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a high pitch and moderate speed, accompanied by a gasp and a sigh.
